query:
SELECT externalId, name FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Nodo%West%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Nodo%CBD%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Nodo%Carindale%'
   OR name LIKE '%Nodo%Village%'
ORDER BY name;
